name: Chizuru Ooshima
description:
__Height:__ 165 cm (5'5)

She is a member of the committee class, chosen because she wears glasses. She was helped by Yoshida Haru, and after been cheered her up by Haru, she fell in love with him. She is very shy, a little pessimistic, and anxious, and even though she likes Haru, she always gives him advice when he can't understand Shizuku.
